Our Story

About EhViewer

EhViewer is a free, open-source manga and anime comic reader for Android, licensed under the GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3). The current release is version 1.14.6, published on December 17, 2025, supporting Android 8.0 and above.

EhViewer was originally created by Hippo Seven in 2014 as a lightweight gallery client for Android. In 2020, NekoInverter forked the project to modernize the codebase and add Material Design support. Tarsin Norbin took over maintenance in 2022, introducing Material Design 3 and Dynamic Color theming. Since 2023, Foolbar and the Ehviewer-Overhauled community have driven development, adding offline download management, advanced tag search, and configurable multi-source gallery browsing.

Today the project is maintained by the Ehviewer-Overhauled GitHub organization. Contributors, translators, and testers from around the world keep EhViewer growing — with no ads, no tracking, and no cost to readers.

What Drives Us

What EhViewer stands for

The values that guide every decision behind EhViewer and keep the reading experience fun.

Discovery

EhViewer is built to help you find your next favorite series — fresh features that make discovering manga on your phone genuinely fun.

Reader-First Design

Like a perfectly organized manga shelf, EhViewer keeps everything exactly where you need it — a smooth, intuitive experience for every reader.

Community

Being open source means fans helping fans. Contributors, translators, and maintainers around the world keep it growing.

Project Timeline

How EhViewer evolved

2014

EhViewer created

Hippo Seven builds the original EhViewer as a lightweight Android gallery client.

2020

NekoInverter fork

NekoInverter forks the project to modernize the codebase and add Material Design support.

2022

Material Design 3

Tarsin Norbin introduces Material Design 3, Dynamic Color theming, and improved performance.

2023

Ehviewer-Overhauled

Foolbar and the community take over. Offline downloads, advanced tag search, and multi-source browsing added.

2025

Version 1.14.6

Latest stable release (December 17, 2025) with support for Android 8.0+ and Marshmallow 6.0+ flavors.

Ready for your next reading arc?

Download EhViewer for Android and dive into your next favorite manga — free, open source, no signup, no ads.

Download EhViewerContact us
EhViewer

EhViewer — a free, open-source manga reader for Android — iOS coming soon — built by the community.
